revisedClaim: Receipt-stable descriptor residuals remain a promising bounded signal only when the receipt is stable, the descriptor is explicit, the baseline does not fully explain the residual, and replay preserves the coarse descriptor. The gauntlet narrowed the candidate on package metadata and sparse public-table cases.
downgradedComponents: package metadata residuals without runtime evidence
receipt stability used without baseline pressure
preservedComponents: receipt hash stability as a necessary screen
descriptor mutation sensitivity on structured datasets
fresh holdout support on several public data artifacts
einsteinPathScoreUpdate: 64 -> 62 because the gauntlet improved falsification pressure but narrowed the discovery candidate.
